note: Logical coherence of each organiser baseline's own Task-1 global alignment. 'unsat' is the number of unsatisfiable named classes in the merged ontology O_src ∪ O_tgt ∪ M, where M is the system's submitted alignment asserted as EquivalentClasses; the incoherence degree is that count over the merged named-class signature. Computed organiser-side with ROBOT. ELK is a sound lower bound (unsat_ELK ≤ unsat_HermiT); HermiT is exact but only terminates on NCIT-DOID at this scale.

footnotes.elk_lower_bound: Every ELK figure is a sound under-approximation of the exact count.
footnotes.deprecated_basis: Computed on each system's raw submitted alignment, which — unlike the repaired reference — has not had correspondences involving owl:deprecated classes excluded. See caveats.deprecated_filter.
footnotes.hermit_scale: HermiT was attempted on all three pairs but only completed on NCIT-DOID; the SNOMED pairs carry ELK lower bounds only.

caveats.deprecated_filter: The reference-coherence figures published in reference_coherence.json were recomputed after correspondences touching owl:deprecated classes were excluded (NCIT-DOID 18053 → 17850; SNOMED-NCIT 466377 → 466306). The baseline alignments here were not rebuilt on that basis, so these counts may be marginally over-stated relative to the reference table. Pending verification.
caveats.missing_cells: AML and LogMapLt on SNOMED-FMA were scripted but produced no output; the LogMapLt driver referenced an input path under /home/jon/new_bioml_workspace/ that holds no coherence results, which is consistent with those runs having failed.
caveats.excluded_bad_hermit: Two HermiT files on disk are not used here: bertmap__coherence_global_SNOMED_FMA_scores__HermiT.json is a verbatim copy of the ELK result (its body records reasoner_used=elk, lower_bound=true), and LOGMAP_LT__coherence_global_SNOMED_NCIT_scores__HermiT.json is flagged exact but reports figures identical to ELK, which is not consistent with the documented expectation that SNOMED-scale pairs do not terminate under HermiT.
caveats.excluded_systems: Lexical-Baseline has coherence results for all three pairs but is omitted here to keep this table row-matched to the global P/R/F1 table above, from which it was deliberately dropped.
